key_additions: Two new API endpoint constants: LOAD_CODE_ASSIST_URL, RETRIEVE_USER_QUOTA_URL
Response type: LoadCodeAssistResponse with cloudaicompanionProject field
Enum QuotaResponse with #[serde(untagged)] to handle object vs array response shapes
Struct QuotaEntry with remaining_fraction, reset_time, model_id fields
Async method load_code_assist() - POST to loadCodeAssist, returns cloudaicompanionProject
Async method retrieve_user_quota() - POST to retrieveUserQuota with project parameter
Method parse_quota_response() - pure logic separated from I/O for testability
Updated fetch() to integrate 5-step workflow: credentials → client → loadCodeAssist → retrieveUserQuota → parse
14 comprehensive unit tests for quota parsing: valid pro/flash, pro-only, flash-only, empty, missing fields, unknown models, boundary cases

patterns_discovered.pattern: Untagged serde enum for polymorphic responses
patterns_discovered.description: QuotaResponse uses #[serde(untagged)] to deserialize both {quotas: []} and direct array [] JSON shapes, with into_entries() converter

patterns_discovered.pattern: Best-effort API chain with graceful degradation
patterns_discovered.description: loadCodeAssist is optional (returns Option); if fails, empty string passed to retrieveUserQuota; retrieveUserQuota error is propagated
parse_quota_response() is pure function taking &[QuotaEntry], no I/O, enabling unit tests without network mocking

patterns_discovered.pattern: Model type classification via contains() substring matching
patterns_discovered.description: Pro/Flash models identified by case-insensitive 'pro'/'flash' substring in model_id; handles variants like 'gemini-2.5-pro-exp-03-25'
Tracks pro_min and flash_min separately; uses (1 - min) * 100 formula to convert remainingFraction to usage percentage
Uses DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339() then with_timezone(&Utc) to normalize all reset times to UTC

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Optional field handling in API responses
gotchas_discovered.description: All QuotaEntry fields are Option types with serde defaults; missing fields don't fail deserialization but are silently None
gotchas_discovered.impact: Must check Some() before using values; entries with None remaining_fraction are skipped in aggregation

gotchas_discovered.description: API may return either {quotas: [...]} or direct [...]; untagged enum + into_entries() handles both
gotchas_discovered.impact: Naive deserialization would fail on direct array response; requires enum pattern

gotchas_discovered.description: Formula (1.0 - fraction) * 100.0 must clamp to [0.0, 100.0] and round to u8; fractional values like 54.6 become 55
gotchas_discovered.impact: Ensures UI display never exceeds 100% despite floating-point math; rounding handles 0.5+ behavior

gotchas_discovered.description: entry.model_id.as_deref().unwrap_or("") returns empty string if None; to_lowercase() on empty string is safe but will never match 'pro' or 'flash'
gotchas_discovered.impact: Entries with None model_id are silently ignored; acceptable per spec

gotchas_discovered.description: DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339() returns Err if string is malformed; errors are silently skipped via if let Ok()
gotchas_discovered.impact: Malformed resetTime fields don't fail the whole response; simply aren't included in reset_at calculation

workflow_implemented: Step 1: Read OAuth credentials from file
Step 2: Extract OAuth client binary path
Step 3: Refresh access token via TokenRefreshResponse
Step 4: POST loadCodeAssist to get cloudaicompanionProject (best-effort, returns Option)
Step 5: POST retrieveUserQuota with project ID or empty string
Step 6: Deserialize QuotaResponse (handles object and array shapes)
Step 7: Parse entries into ProviderSnapshot with pro/flash model classification, min-based aggregation, UTC reset time
approach_details.testing_coverage: 14 unit tests covering: valid pro+flash, pro-only, flash-only, empty entries, missing remaining_fraction, unknown model IDs, and malformed reset times
approach_details.error_handling: HTTP errors logged with status code and body; missing fields handled via Option/serde defaults; malformed datetimes skipped

recommendations.suggestion: Add exponential backoff retry logic to retrieve_user_quota() for transient HTTP failures (429, 503)
recommendations.rationale: Google API quota endpoints may rate-limit; exponential backoff standard for production OAuth flows

recommendations.suggestion: Consider caching retrieveUserQuota responses with short TTL (e.g., 5 minutes) to avoid redundant API calls
recommendations.rationale: Quota state unlikely to change within minutes; reduces load on Google API and improves response latency

recommendations.suggestion: Add debug logging at load_code_assist(), retrieve_user_quota(), and parse_quota_response() entry points
recommendations.rationale: OAuth quota debugging is opaque; logs would help diagnose API contract changes or missing fields

recommendations.suggestion: Document expected model_id values (pro vs flash variants) and resetTime RFC3339 format in comments
recommendations.rationale: API is internal (:loadCodeAssist, :retrieveUserQuota); contract subject to change; docs prevent future confusion

recommendations.suggestion: Add integration test mocking Google API responses with real HTTP server (or VCR-style replay)
recommendations.rationale: Current tests are pure parsing; integration test would catch response shape changes or auth failures
